title: xyris scabridula
intro: Xyris scabridula, also known as the hairy yellow-eyed grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xyris scabridula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions or decoctions, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds for various health benefits.
